subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath adorned thy temple with the ornament of hearing, summoned thee before the Throne, and caused thee to hear His glorious and wondrous Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من زین هیکلک بطراز الاذن و احضرک لدی العرش و اسمعک ندآئه العزیز البدیع
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement
